priorNormalizedHtmlProof.normalizationScope: HTML references to emitted JS/CSS chunk filenames and the Next build-id field

sensitiveValueScan.limitations: Heuristic counts are not a proof that no secret exists. Values are intentionally not reproduced.

findings.title: Installed chronological packet order conflicts with binding WO042 precedence, and no generic semantic-slot resolver or selected-record proof exists.
Current inventory omits public sources, inverts generated service-page reachability, and misses context-composed blocked Analytics claims.
Target extraction omits exact values and source provenance, loses governed relationships, and materially misclassifies records.
The deterministic commercial-copy gate is absent from the standard test script and GitHub Actions.
The semantic validator does not enforce exact blocked-claim membership, contextual claims, source locations, or policy text.
Generated artifacts duplicate large amounts of source and non-public operational text, creating repository and exposure cost.
The prior equality proof compares normalized HTML, not emitted chunk or asset bytes; independent source/import evidence keeps the no-render-change conclusion credible.
